application.name: Litmus Grafana
application.description: Litmus Grafana is a ready-to-use Grafana image with built-in plugins and the Litmus Edge Datasource for real-time edge stream visualization inside Litmus Edge.

releases.name: latest-test
releases.readme:
Litmus Grafana is a preconfigured Grafana image for Litmus Edge with bundled visualization plugins and the Litmus Edge Datasource preinstalled.
### Litmus Edge Datasource
Set **Edge Docker Gateway IP** if your instance does not use the default `10.30.50.1` gateway, and optionally provide an **API Token** for topic discovery in the query editor.
For full setup, usage, and troubleshooting details, see the [Litmus Grafana README](https://github.com/litmusautomation/edge-datasource/blob/main/litmus-grafana/README.md).
releases.description: Litmus Grafana is a ready-to-use Grafana image with built-in plugins and the Litmus Edge Datasource for real-time edge stream visualization.

variables.name: GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT
variables.description: HTTP port exposed by the Grafana container.
variables.label: Grafana HTTP Port

variables.name: EDGE_DOCKER_GATEWAY_IP
variables.description: Docker gateway IP used to reach Litmus Edge from the Grafana container. Update it if this instance uses a different gateway IP.
variables.label: Edge Docker Gateway IP

variables.name: EDGE_API_TOKEN
variables.description: Optional API Token used for topic discovery in the query editor.
variables.label: API Token
